ogTitle: Stewarts Brook vs Stockinbingal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stewarts Brook and Stockinbingal.
heading: Stewarts Brook vs Stockinbingal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stewarts Brook, New South Wales and Stockinbingal, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stockinbingal has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Stewarts Brook (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stewarts Brook or Stockinbingal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stewarts Brook has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Stockinbingal scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stewarts Brook scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Stockinbingal scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stewarts Brook or Stockinbingal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stockinbingal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
